title: Gate Set Tomography: Complete Gate Characterization
description: Learn gate set tomography (GST) for complete, self-consistent characterization of quantum gate operations. Understand how GST overcomes SPAM limitations and provides detailed error information.
learningObjectives: Explain the principles and advantages of gate set tomography
Understand the GST protocol including fiducials and germs
Interpret GST results including process matrices and error generators
Compare GST with randomized benchmarking for different use cases
Apply GST analysis to diagnose specific gate errors
